name: Phase
summary: The Phase class defines a model object phase.

constructors.name: Phase()
constructors.summary: Instantiates a new phase with the phase number 0.

constructors.name: Phase(Int32)
constructors.summary: Instantiates a new phase with the given phase number.

constructors.name: Phase(Int32, String, String, Int32)
constructors.signature: public Phase(int PhaseNumber, string PhaseName, string PhaseComment, int IsCurrentPhase)
constructors.summary: Instantiates a new phase with the given parameters.

params.name: IsCurrentPhase
params.doc: The value is 1 if the phase is the current phase, 0 otherwise.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes a phase. The current phase cannot be deleted.

returns.doc: True on success, false if failed (the attached objects probably caused the failure).

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref double Value)
methods.summary: Retrieves a double property for the phase.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be retrieved, in capital letters.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref int Value)
methods.summary: Retrieves an integer property for the phase.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be retrieved, in capital letters.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref string Value)
methods.summary: Retrieves a string property for the phase.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be retrieved, in capital letters.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.
True on success, false if failed (the reason for the failure is probably that the phase number already exists).
True on success, false if failed (PhaseNumber should be higher than 0).
True on success, false if failed (PhaseNumber should be higher than 0).

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, double Value)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the phase.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set, in capital letters.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, int Value)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the phase.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set, in capital letters.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, string Value)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the phase.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set, in capital letters.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

properties.name: IsCurrentPhase
properties.summary: The value is 1 if the phase is the current phase, 0 otherwise.
